gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/521)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/521)
text: قَالَ أَبِي ( عليه السلام ) مَا ضَرَبَ رَجُلٌ الْقُرْآنَ بَعْضَهُ بِبَعْضٍ إِلَّا كَفَرَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Husayn Bin Saeed, from Al Nazar Bin Suweyd, from Al Qasim Bi Suleyman,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘My<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No man would strike the Quranic parts with each other (explain one Verse with another), except that he would disbelieve’.
en.sarwar: 17. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Husayn ibn Sa’id from al-Nadr ibn Suwayd from al-Qasim ibn Sulayman from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Once my father said to me, “Whoever mixes up the Holy Quran becomes an unbeliever.’”
